name: 김원준
summary: 공정거래위원회 사무처장 직무대행과 주OECD 대한민국 대표부 주재관 등을 역임했으며, 파리 제10대학교에서 경제학 박사학위를 받았다.

name: 전성호
summary: 성균관대학교에서 경제학 학사·석사·박사학위를 받았으며, 경제사와 회계사(會計史), 개성의 상업과 자본을 연구한다.

name: 빌라이폰 솜사몬
summary: 수파누봉대학교 한국학센터를 이끌며 지속가능 관광, 지역경제와 한국학을 연구한다.

name: 장원
summary: 한중 전통 회계사를 연구해 경제학 박사학위를 받았으며, 동아시아 경제사와 상업·무역 네트워크를 연구한다.

name: 구잘 샤무라토바
summary: 중앙아시아와 한반도의 초문화 현상을 연구하며 대한민국과의 무역·투자·경제협력에 관해 자문한다.

name: 레 란 흐엉
summary: 한국과 베트남의 인적자원개발 연구로 경제학 박사학위를 받았으며 인력계획, 경영학과 경제성장을 연구한다.

name: 존 오 리
summary: 대한민국 출신 미국 토목·건설 기업인으로, 1987년 회사를 설립해 연방정부와 군 관련 건설사업을 수행해 왔다.

name: Dr. Wonjoon Kim
summary: He formerly served as Acting Secretary General of the Korea Fair Trade Commission and as a Counsellor at the Korean Delegation to the OECD.
bio: Former Acting Secretary General of the Korea Fair Trade Commission
Economic Planning Board, KFTC, and Korean Delegation to the OECD
PhD in Economics, Paris Nanterre University
MPA, Seoul National University; BA in Economics, Sungkyunkwan University
highlights: Former Director General for Competition Policy at the KFTC
MPA, Seoul National University; BA in Economics, Sungkyunkwan University

name: Dr. SeongHo Jun
position: Professor at the Academy of Korean Studies
summary: He holds BA, MA, and PhD degrees in Economics from Sungkyunkwan University and researches economic and accounting history.
bio: Professor at the Academy of Korean Studies
BA, MA, and PhD in Economics, Sungkyunkwan University
Postdoctoral research at the University of Oxford
Visiting Professor at Goethe University Frankfurt
Researcher at the International Institute of Social History, Netherlands
highlights: Visiting Professor at Goethe University Frankfurt
Researcher at the International Institute of Social History

name: Dr. Vilayphone Somsamone
position: Associate Professor and Acting Dean, Souphanouvong University
summary: She leads the university's Center for Korean Studies and researches sustainable tourism, regional development, and Korean studies.
bio: PhD in Economics, Graduate School of Korean Studies, AKS
Associate Professor and Acting Dean of the Faculty of Economics and Tourism, Souphanouvong University
Director of the Center for Korean Studies at Souphanouvong University
highlights: Director of the Center for Korean Studies
PhD in Economics, Academy of Korean Studies, 2017

name: Dr. Zhang Wen
position: Center for Economic Research, Shandong University
summary: She researches East Asian economic history, traditional accounting, commercial networks, and trade relations.
bio: PhD in Economics, Graduate School of Korean Studies, AKS
Center for Economic Research, Shandong University
Former Postdoctoral Researcher, School of Business, Southern University of Science and Technology
Former Researcher at the China Accounting Museum
highlights: PhD in Economics, Academy of Korean Studies, 2019

name: Dr. Gozal Shamuratova
position: Professor at Karakalpakstan National University and Advisor to the Chair of the Supreme Council
summary: She researches transculturalism in Central Asia and Korea and advises on trade, investment, and economic relations with the Republic of Korea.
bio: PhD in Economics, Graduate School of Korean Studies, AKS
Advisor to the Chair of the Supreme Council of Karakalpakstan
Responsible for trade, investment, and economic relations with the Republic of Korea
highlights: Advisor on trade, investment, and economic relations with the Republic of Korea
PhD in Economics, Academy of Korean Studies, 2024

name: Dr. Le Lan Huong
position: Lecturer, Faculty of Business Administration, Saigon University
summary: She researches human resource development, workforce planning, business administration, and economic growth in Korea and Vietnam.
bio: PhD in Economics, Graduate School of Korean Studies, AKS
Lecturer in the Faculty of Business Administration at Saigon University
Comparative research on human resource development in Korea and Vietnam
highlights: Comparative research on Korean and Vietnamese human resource development
PhD in Economics, Academy of Korean Studies, 2020

name: John O. Lee
summary: A South Korea-born civil engineering and construction executive in the United States, he founded ACE Engineering in 1987 and has led government and military construction projects.
bio: CEO of ACE Engineering, Inc., USA
Construction projects for U.S. federal, military, state, and local government clients
BS in Civil Engineering, Sungkyunkwan University
highlights: BS in Civil Engineering, Sungkyunkwan University, 1980
Construction projects for U.S. federal, military, state, and local government clients
